description: A senior partner needs to assess a new potential litigation matter to determine its viability and strategy.

nodes.task_description: Review the client intake form and all initial documents provided by the potential client.

expected_outcome.value: Agent summarizes the key facts, parties, and nature of the dispute.

nodes.task_description: Perform a preliminary legal research to identify the relevant causes of action and statutes of limitations.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies 2-3 potential legal claims and confirms the filing deadline has not passed.

nodes.task_description: Draft a preliminary case assessment memo outlining the facts, potential claims, risks, and recommended next steps.

expected_outcome.value: Agent produces a structured memo for the partner's review.
